# PERF-027 positive: bytes.Buffer allocated per request with no sync.Pool
lang: go
file: PERF-027-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Render(c *gin.Context) {
	buf := bytes.Buffer{}
	buf.WriteString("hello")
	c.Data(http.StatusOK, "text/plain", buf.Bytes())
}
